title: Introduce watchtower_host and move CLI composition out of reusable core
summary: Moves parser construction and command registration into a host-owned package while preserving the watchtower-core binary name.
scope_items: Create the host package and move root parser construction and pack dispatch there.
Remove direct watchtower_core CLI ownership of pack composition and plan command wiring.
done_when_items: The watchtower-core console script resolves to watchtower_host.
Reusable core no longer composes pack commands directly.
